scripts.test: node --test --experimental-strip-types src/services/feedPartition.node.test.ts src/services/labelClassifier.node.test.ts src/services/storage.node.test.ts src/services/labelSuggester.node.test.ts src/components/TopicFilter.node.test.ts src/services/syncWorker.node.test.ts
scripts.build:gh-pages: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && npm run typecheck && cross-env GITHUB_PAGES=true vite build
scripts.preview:gh-pages: npm run build:gh-pages && cross-env GITHUB_PAGES=true vite preview
